tooltip.ready:
OBS is ready
Left click {primaryAction}
Right click toggles recording
Middle click toggles the replay buffer
tooltip.needs_restart:
OBS is running, but WebSocket control is unavailable
Restart OBS once to restore controls

header.title: OBS Control
header.active: Active outputs: {outputs}. Manage capture, replay, or streaming from here.
header.ready: OBS is connected and ready for recording, replay, or streaming.
header.qt_websockets_missing: Qt WebSockets support is unavailable in this Quickshell runtime. Install qt6-websockets to enable OBS controls.
header.config_missing: OBS websocket config is missing or disabled. Open OBS, enable obs-websocket, and try again.
header.needs_restart: OBS is open, but WebSocket control is unavailable until it is restarted once.
header.offline: OBS is offline. Launch it here and the widget will track its state.

status.label: Status
status.connected_hint: Left click {primaryAction}. Right click toggles recording, middle click toggles replay, and the panel exposes streaming and save actions.
status.qt_websockets_missing_hint: Qt WebSockets support is missing in this Quickshell runtime. Install qt6-websockets, then restart Noctalia to enable OBS controls.
status.config_missing_hint: OBS websocket config is missing or disabled. Open OBS, enable obs-websocket, then restart or refresh the plugin.
status.disconnected_hint: WebSocket control is unavailable right now. Launch or restart OBS to restore quick actions.
status.managed_hint: Plugin-managed launches can close OBS after the last active recording, replay, or stream stops.

header.label: OBS Control
header.description: Control how often the plugin polls OBS, how it launches OBS, and when recording, replay, or streaming state appears in the shell.

runtime.qt_websockets_missing: Qt WebSockets support is unavailable in this Quickshell runtime. Install qt6-websockets and restart Noctalia to enable OBS controls.
runtime.websocket_config_missing: OBS websocket config is missing or disabled. Open OBS, enable obs-websocket, then refresh or restart Noctalia.

poll_interval.label: Poll Interval
poll_interval.description: How often the plugin refreshes OBS state, in milliseconds.

left_click_action.label: Left Click Action
left_click_action.description: Choose whether left click opens the panel or toggles recording or streaming directly.

launch_behavior.label: Launch Behavior
launch_behavior.description: Choose how the explicit Launch OBS action opens OBS. Automatic recording, replay, or streaming starts still launch minimized to the tray.

bar_label_mode.label: Bar Label Mode
bar_label_mode.description: Choose how the bar indicator renders active OBS outputs.

videos_path.label: Videos Path
videos_path.description: Optional custom folder used by the panel and the toast action. Leave empty to use your default Videos directory.

videos_opener.label: Videos Opener
videos_opener.description: Command used to open the Videos folder. Set this to your GUI file manager if xdg-open resolves to a terminal opener.

auto_close_managed.label: Auto-Close Managed OBS
auto_close_managed.description: If the plugin had to cold-launch OBS for recording, replay, or streaming, close OBS again after the last active output stops.

open_videos_after_stop.label: Show Open Videos After Stop
open_videos_after_stop.description: Offer an Open Videos toast action after recording stops or a replay is saved.

show_elapsed_in_bar.label: Show Elapsed In Bar
show_elapsed_in_bar.description: Allow duration labels in the bar when Bar Label Mode is set to Duration Labels.

show_bar_recording.label: Show Bar While Recording
show_bar_recording.description: Display the bar indicator while OBS is actively recording.

show_bar_replay.label: Show Bar While Replay Is Active
show_bar_replay.description: Keep the bar indicator visible when only the replay buffer is running.

show_bar_streaming.label: Show Bar While Streaming
show_bar_streaming.description: Keep the bar indicator visible when OBS is actively streaming.

show_control_center_recording.label: Show Control Center While Recording
show_control_center_recording.description: Show the Control Center shortcut while OBS is recording.

show_control_center_replay.label: Show Control Center While Replay Is Active
show_control_center_replay.description: Show the Control Center shortcut while the replay buffer is active.

show_control_center_streaming.label: Show Control Center While Streaming
show_control_center_streaming.description: Show the Control Center shortcut while OBS is streaming.

show_control_center_ready.label: Show Control Center When OBS Is Ready
show_control_center_ready.description: Keep the shortcut visible when OBS is connected but idle.

record_stopped_autoclose.title: OBS recording stopped
record_stopped_autoclose.body: Recording saved to Videos. OBS closed.

replay_stopped_autoclose.title: OBS replay buffer stopped
replay_stopped_autoclose.body: Instant replay is off. OBS closed.

replay_saved.title: OBS replay saved
replay_saved.body: Saved the last replay buffer to Videos.

offline.title: OBS is offline
offline.body: Launch OBS to use recording controls.

qt_websockets_missing.title: Qt WebSockets support missing
qt_websockets_missing.body: Qt WebSockets support is unavailable in this Quickshell runtime. Install qt6-websockets to enable OBS controls.

websocket_config_missing.title: OBS websocket not configured
websocket_config_missing.body: OBS websocket config is missing or disabled. Open OBS, enable obs-websocket, and try again.
